mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.content, c.user_id, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.parent_id, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.rating, u.name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.role as user_role, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE parent_id = c.id AND status = 0) as reply_count, CASE WHEN c.target_type = 'activity' THEN (SELECT title FROM activity WHERE id = c.target_id) WHEN c.target_type = 'news' THEN (SELECT title FROM news WHERE id = c.target_id) ELSE '' END as target_title FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.status = 0

SELECT c.id, c.content, c.user_id, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.parent_id, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.rating, u.name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.role as user_role, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE parent_id = c.id AND status = 0) as reply_count FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.target_type = #{targetType} AND c.target_id = #{targetId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.status = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.content, c.user_id, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.parent_id, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.rating, u.name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.role as user_role, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE parent_id = c.id AND status = 0) as reply_count FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.target_type = #{targetType} AND c.target_id = #{targetId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.status = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT c.id, c.content, c.user_id, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.parent_id, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.rating, u.name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.role as user_role FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalComments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = 'activity' AND status = 0) as activityComments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = 'news' AND status = 0) as newsComments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = 'service_item' AND status = 0) as serviceItemComments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND status = 0) as todayComments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE YEARWEEK(create_time) = YEARWEEK(NOW()) AND status = 0) as thisWeekComments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(NOW()) AND status = 0) as thisMonthComments FROM comment WHERE status = 0

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN rating IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as totalRatings, COUNT(CASE WHEN target_type = 'activity' AND rating IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as activityRatings, COUNT(CASE WHEN target_type = 'service_item' AND rating IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as serviceItemRatings, AVG(CASE WHEN rating IS NOT NULL THEN rating END) as averageRating, AVG(CASE WHEN target_type = 'activity' AND rating IS NOT NULL THEN rating END) as activityAverageRating, AVG(CASE WHEN target_type = 'service_item' AND rating IS NOT NULL THEN rating END) as serviceItemAverageRating, COUNT(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 END) as fiveStarCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 END) as fourStarCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 END) as threeStarCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 END) as twoStarCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 END) as oneStarCount FROM comment WHERE status = 0

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND rating IS NOT NULL AND status = 0) as totalRatings, (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND rating IS NOT NULL AND status = 0) as averageRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND rating = 5 AND status = 0) as fiveStarCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND rating = 4 AND status = 0) as fourStarCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND rating = 3 AND status = 0) as threeStarCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND rating = 2 AND status = 0) as twoStarCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND rating = 1 AND status = 0) as oneStarCount FROM comment WHERE status = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND status = 0
